evidence_quotes.quote: horror/action games and erotic games on Steam (2025)

paragraphs.text: Ladies and Gentlemen, the purpose of the DFA was to prevent online payment providers from imposing their values and morals on their customers. The most widespread online payment providers, such as VISA, Mastercard and Paypal, refuse to execute payments and threaten to exclude adult content platforms, which are legal under the law, and thus severely restrict their business and limit the customers concerned through content censorship. Examples of this type: Erotic content in Japan (2024), horror/action games and erotic games on Steam (2025) providers with almost a monopoly on global payments should not be allowed to exercise censorship. Yours sincerely, Peter Jahn
